channel.title: Azure VPN Gateway on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure VPN Gateway on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: IPv6 support for Azure VPN Gateway
item.description:
Azure VPN Gateway now supports IPv6 inner traffic in dual-stack VPN tunnels. The feature is available on all production SKU gateways that use standard public IPs.

  • Source: Azure Updates
